login.title: Sign in to Hesabat
login.subtitle: Enter your details to access the dashboard
login.errorGeneric: An error occurred while signing in

forgot.title: Reset your password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email to receive a reset link
forgot.error: Failed to send reset link, please try again
forgot.sentBody: We've sent you a password reset link. If you don't see it, check your spam folder.

reset.title: Set new password
reset.subtitle: Enter your new password
reset.invalidBody: This link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.
reset.doneBody: You can now sign in with your new password.

signup.title: Register a new company
signup.subtitle: Create your account and start managing your books

accept.invalidBody: This link is invalid or has expired. Contact your company manager to send a new invitation.
accept.invitedAs: You were invited to join as
accept.errorGeneric: An error occurred while accepting the invitation

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters

support.title: Support
support.subtitle: Submit a support ticket or feature request
support.subject: Subject
support.bodyPlaceholder: Describe the issue or feature in detail...

auditPage.title: Activity Log
auditPage.subtitle: A permanent, read-only record of all journal actions — it cannot be deleted

fiscalYearsPage.title: Fiscal Years
fiscalYearsPage.subtitle: Define your fiscal years and close them at year-end to carry profit forward

errors.rangeInvalid: End date must be after the start date

confirmClose.title: Close this fiscal year?
confirmClose.description: A closing entry will carry the net profit or loss into the retained earnings account, and posting into this period will be blocked. You can reopen it later.

confirmReopen.title: Reopen this fiscal year?
confirmReopen.description: The closing entry will be deleted and the period unlocked so it can be edited again.

confirmDelete.title: Delete this fiscal year?
confirmDelete.description: The fiscal year definition will be permanently removed. This cannot be undone.

periodLock.title: Period Lock
periodLock.subtitle: Prevents creating or modifying any entry dated on or before the lock date. Soft lock — can be cleared at any time.

toast.error: Could not update the period lock

confirm.clearDescription: Editing entries in all prior periods will be allowed again.

settings.title: Company Settings
settings.subtitle: All your company settings and data in one place

backup.title: Data Backup
backup.subtitle: Export all your company data as a JSON file
backup.description: This feature lets you export a full backup of your company data. A JSON file will be created containing:

dashboard.distributionHint: Share of account types in the tree

accounts.title: Chart of Accounts
accounts.subtitle: Manage the company's accounting directory
accounts.loadDefaultsHint: A ready-made Egyptian chart you can edit later
accounts.isGroupHint: Cannot be posted to directly; groups sub-accounts
accounts.deleteBody: Are you sure you want to delete the account "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
accounts.cannotDeleteLocked: Cannot delete an account with posted entries
accounts.bulkAddHint: Enter one account name per line

toast.defaultsLoaded: Default chart of accounts loaded successfully
toast.defaultsError: Could not load the default chart of accounts

team.title: Team & Permissions
team.subtitle: Manage team members, their roles, and invite new employees
team.removeBody: Are you sure you want to remove "{{name}}" from the team? They will lose access to the company immediately.
team.revokeBody: Are you sure you want to revoke the invitation for "{{email}}"? The invite link will stop working.
team.linkCreatedHint: Copy the link and send it to the employee to complete registration. The link is valid for 7 days.

owner.label: Owner
owner.desc: Full control of the system, team, and permissions

manager.label: Manager
manager.desc: All accounting operations without team or subscription management

accountant.label: Accountant
accountant.desc: Add and edit accounts and entries (no deletion)

data_entry.label: Data entry
data_entry.desc: Add data only, without editing or deleting

company.title: Company Profile
company.subtitle: Company profile, registration details, and currency
company.name: Company name
company.activityPlaceholder: e.g. Wholesale trade of electrical appliances

comingSoon.title: Coming very soon
comingSoon.body: We're working hard to add this feature soon to make managing your books easier and more comprehensive.

eInvoice.title: E-Invoice
eInvoice.subtitle: Connect your invoices to government e-invoicing systems
eInvoice.comingSoonBody: We're working on e-invoice integration with government authorities in Egypt, Saudi Arabia, UAE, and other countries.
eInvoice.feature1Body: Send invoices directly to government authorities with one click.
eInvoice.feature2Body: Compatible with e-invoice standards in Egypt, Saudi Arabia, UAE, and more.
eInvoice.feature3Body: UUID-based verification for every invoice to prevent tampering and fraud.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: Sorry, the page you are looking for does not exist.

taxes.title: Taxes
taxes.subtitle: Define tax types, rates, and link them to the chart of accounts

hints.vat: VAT is applied to revenue invoices at different rates depending on the service nature.
hints.wht: Withholding tax is deducted from the supplier at payment and posted to a 'withholding payable' account.
hints.income: Income / corporate tax is computed on net profit according to the country's law.
hints.payroll: Payroll tax is deducted from employee salaries on progressive brackets.
hints.zakat: Zakat is computed on the zakat base for eligible entities.

taxes.name: Tax name
taxes.seedDefaultsHint: Automatically load the tax types for your company's country (you can edit or delete them later).
taxes.whtDebitAccountHint: Account debited on sales — e.g. WHT receivable
taxes.deleteBody: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.

currencies.title: Currencies & Exchange Rates
currencies.subtitle: Define foreign currencies and each one's rate against your base currency
currencies.neverUpdated: Rates have not been auto-updated yet
currencies.baseCurrencyHint: Each currency's rate is the value of one unit in your base currency ({{base}}). E.g. 1 USD = 50 {{base}}.
currencies.name: Currency
currencies.noCurrenciesHint: Add the currencies your company deals with so they appear automatically in journal entries.
currencies.deleteBody: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

validation.rateRequired: Exchange rate must be greater than zero

toast.ratesSkipped: Could not update {{count}} currencies (not available from source)

revaluation.title: Currency Revaluation
revaluation.subtitle: Restate foreign-currency account balances at the period-end exchange rate
revaluation.explainer: On the date you choose, the system restates every foreign-currency account's book value to that date's exchange rate, then posts a single journal entry for the unrealized gain or loss. A positive amount is a gain (revenue) and a negative amount is a loss ({{base}}).
revaluation.noRuns: No revaluations have been run yet

toast.success: Revaluation completed and journal entry posted
toast.alreadyRevalued: This date has already been revalued
toast.closedPeriod: Cannot revalue inside a closed fiscal year, or the date is invalid

assets.title: Fixed Assets
assets.subtitle: Register company assets and compute their monthly straight-line depreciation
assets.name: Asset
assets.usefulLifeHint: Number of months over which the asset is fully depreciated. e.g. 5 years = 60 months.
assets.noAssetsHint: Add company assets (vehicles, equipment, machinery…) to compute depreciation automatically.
assets.deleteBody: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

validation.costRequired: Cost must be greater than zero
validation.salvageTooHigh: Salvage value must be less than cost
validation.lifeRequired: Useful life must be greater than zero

depreciation.title: Run monthly depreciation
depreciation.hint: One draft depreciation entry will be created for all active assets due in the selected month.
depreciation.nothingBody: No assets are due for depreciation this month (either fully depreciated or already recorded).

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.subtitle: Manage stock items and movements using weighted-average costing
inventory.name: Item
inventory.noItemsHint: Start by adding stock items (goods, raw materials, products…) to track their quantities and value.
inventory.noMovementsHint: Record a receipt, issue, or adjustment for an item; a draft journal entry is created for each movement.
inventory.deleteBody: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

movement.title: Record stock movement
movement.hint: Each movement creates a draft journal entry for you to review and post later.
movement.quantityHint: For adjustments: positive to increase, negative to decrease.
movement.unitCostHint: Purchase cost of a single unit on receipt.
movement.counterpartHintIssue: Usually cost of goods sold or an expense.
movement.counterpartHintAdjustment: Usually a stock-variance account or expense.

validation.accountRequired: An inventory account must be selected
validation.quantityRequired: Quantity must be greater than zero
validation.quantityNonZero: Adjustment quantity must not be zero
validation.unitCostRequired: Unit cost is required on receipt
validation.counterpartRequired: A counterpart account must be selected

customers.title: Customers
customers.subtitle: Manage customer records and their subsidiary accounts under Receivables (112)
customers.name: Customer
customers.emptyHint: Add your customers — a subsidiary account is auto-created for each under the customers control account, with its balance derived from posted entries.
customers.controlHint: A group account; a subsidiary account for this customer is created under it automatically.
customers.deleteBody: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? Its subsidiary account will also be deleted. This cannot be undone.

validation.controlRequired: Please select the customers control account

suppliers.title: Suppliers
suppliers.subtitle: Manage supplier records and their subsidiary accounts under Payables (211)
suppliers.name: Supplier
suppliers.emptyHint: Add your suppliers — a subsidiary account is auto-created for each under the suppliers control account, with its balance derived from posted entries.
suppliers.controlHint: A group account; a subsidiary account for this supplier is created under it automatically.
suppliers.deleteBody: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? Its subsidiary account will also be deleted. This cannot be undone.

validation.controlRequired: Please select the suppliers control account

costCenters.title: Cost Centers & Projects
costCenters.subtitle: Define projects, branches, and cost centers with their budgets
costCenters.name: Name
costCenters.noCentersHint: Start by adding a project, branch, or cost center to track its budget.
costCenters.deleteBody: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.

openingBalances.title: Opening Balances
openingBalances.subtitle: Enter the starting balances for accounts, banks, customers, suppliers and inventory. They post as one balanced opening journal entry.
openingBalances.existingNote: A saved opening entry exists — it will be replaced on save
openingBalances.equityAbsorbs: Difference of {{amount}} will post to Opening Balance Equity

empty.accounts: No accounts available for entry here.
empty.banks: No bank or cash accounts. Add them from the Banks & Cash screen.
empty.customers: No customers. Add them from the Sales & Customers screen.
empty.suppliers: No suppliers. Add them from the Purchases & Suppliers screen.
empty.inventory: No inventory items. Add them from the Inventory screen.

journal.title: Journal Entries
journal.subtitle: Create, review and post multi-currency accounting entries
journal.noEntriesHint: Start by creating your company first journal entry
journal.baseCurrencyNote: Base-currency amounts are auto-calculated = amount × exchange rate
journal.deleteBody: Are you sure you want to delete entry #{{no}}? This action cannot be undone.
journal.postedLockHint: This entry is posted and cannot be edited
journal.minLines: An entry must have at least two lines

validation.amountRequired: Enter a debit or credit amount

attachments.title: Attachments
attachments.saveFirst: Save the entry first to attach files

journal.submitLockHint: This entry is awaiting approval and cannot be edited
journal.approvedLockHint: This entry is approved and ready to post

payroll.title: Payroll & Employees
payroll.subtitle: Employee files and monthly payroll runs
payroll.noEmployeesHint: Add employee files with base salary, allowances and deductions.
payroll.noRunsHint: Pick a month and accounts to run payroll for active employees.
payroll.name: Name

form.componentsHint: Fixed monthly amounts — allowances add to gross, deductions subtract to reach net.

run.title: Run Monthly Payroll
run.periodHint: Payroll for all active employees will be computed for this month.
run.netPayableHint: Credited with net pay owed to employees.
run.deductionsHint: Credited with total deductions (required when deductions exist).
run.preview: A draft journal entry will be created for the total payroll.
run.custodyAlert: Note: there are {{count}} open custodies not yet settled. Custodies are not auto-deducted from payroll.

payroll.deleteBody: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.

advances.title: Advances & Custodies
advances.subtitle: Employee advances (auto-deducted from payroll) and custodies entrusted to employees

advance.noneHint: Add an advance for an employee, set the monthly installment and advances account.
advance.advancesAccountHint: The advances asset account the installment is credited against each month.

custody.noneHint: Record a custody entrusted to an employee (cash, tools, devices, documents).
custody.settleHint: Upload an Excel file with settlement lines (date, docNo, debit account, credit account, description, cost center, project, amount). A draft journal entry linked to the custody will be created.
custody.settleColumns: Columns: date, docNo, debitAccount, creditAccount, description, costCenter, project, amount

advances.deleteAdvanceBody: Are you sure you want to delete this advance? This cannot be undone.
advances.deleteCustodyBody: Are you sure you want to delete this custody? This cannot be undone.

bank.title: Banks & Cash
bank.subtitle: Manage bank & cash accounts and reconciliations
bank.noAccountsHint: Add a bank account or cash box and link it to a chart account.
bank.noMovementsHint: Record the first movement on this account.

movement.title: Record movement
movement.notesPlaceholder: A note to refer back to later (e.g. the bank statement wording).
movement.counterpartHintIn: Where the money comes from (e.g. a customer or revenue).
movement.counterpartHintOut: Where the money goes (e.g. a supplier or expense).
movement.transferHint: A transfer between two of your own accounts posts as one entry.
movement.fxTransferHint: Cross-currency transfer — enter the amount received in the destination currency and the FX gain/loss will be computed automatically.

transferMatch.title: Match Pending Transfers
transferMatch.hint: Shows candidate pairs of pending movements (out + in) that look like inter-account transfers.
transferMatch.confirmHint: A journal entry will be created linking the two movements as an inter-account transfer.

classify.title: Classify bank movement
classify.descriptionPlaceholder: Write the description that will appear on the entry
classify.selectCounterpart: Pick the counterpart account to finish classifying
classify.exchangeRateWarning: Exchange rate is 1 — the base amount may be wrong, please set the correct rate

fxFix.title: Fix Base Amounts (Foreign Currency)
fxFix.noIssues: No movements with incorrect exchange rate — data looks clean
fxFix.found: Found {{count}} foreign-currency movements stored with exchange rate = 1 (base {{currency}} amounts are wrong)
fxFix.forceRateLabel: Exchange rate to apply to all movements (optional)
fxFix.forceRateHint: Leave blank to auto-use rates already recorded in the system — or enter a rate to force-apply to every affected movement.

bank.importHint: Upload the statement with columns: Date, Debit, Credit, Bank description. Movements are saved pending classification, then classify each by picking its counterpart account.

wizard.title: Bank Statement Import Wizard
wizard.applyAllTitle: Set default classification for all rows
wizard.errorHint: Rows with a red background contain invalid data. Fix them or import valid rows only.
wizard.confirmAllBtn: Import {{count}} movements ({{errors}} errors will be skipped)
wizard.doneHint: You can classify pending movements from the movements table.

reconciliation.noReconciliationsHint: Create a bank reconciliation by comparing the bank statement to your books.
reconciliation.autoMatchSummary: Matched {{matched}}, {{suggested}} suggestion(s) to review, {{unmatched}} unmatched. Review, then click Save matching.
reconciliation.autoMatchNone: No matching movements found. Match the lines manually.
reconciliation.selectAccountFirst: Select an account to create a reconciliation
reconciliation.outstandingHint: Movements in your books not yet on the bank statement (outstanding checks, deposits in transit).

validation.amountPositive: Amount must be greater than zero

bank.confirmDeleteMovement: Delete this movement and its entry?

bulkUnpost.confirmDescription: The journal entry will be deleted and {{count}} movement(s) will return to pending status for re-classification. Movements linked to payments, transfers, or reconciliations will be skipped.

bulkDelete.confirmDescription: {{count}} movement(s) and their journal entries will be permanently deleted. Reconciled movements will be automatically skipped.

invoices.salesSubtitle: Issue customer invoices and collect receivables
invoices.purchasesSubtitle: Record supplier bills and settle payables

returns.serviceOnlyHint: Returns support service/account lines only in this version (no inventory or assets).
returns.noReturnsHint: Create a note from an approved invoice or via the new note button.

invoices.notFound: Document not found or you don't have permission to view it
invoices.noInvoicesHint: Create your first invoice to record sales or purchases
invoices.pasteExcelHint: Paste rows from Excel (description, qty, price, discount)

filter.search: Search by invoice #, customer or supplier

validations.selectCashAccount: Please select a cash or bank account
validations.enterAmount: Please enter an amount greater than zero
validations.allocationsExceedAmount: Total allocations exceed the voucher amount
validations.advanceExceedsBalance: Amount exceeds the remaining advance balance

advances.description: Select a previously recorded advance payment and apply it to this invoice without creating a new journal entry.

invoices.returnsServiceOnly: Notes support service / account lines only in this version.
invoices.confirmDeleteInvoice: Are you sure you want to delete this invoice?
invoices.confirmDeletePayment: Are you sure you want to delete this voucher?
invoices.confirmApprove: A posted journal entry will be created and the invoice can no longer be edited. Continue?
invoices.bulkDeleteBody: {{count}} drafts will be deleted. This action cannot be undone.
invoices.bulkApproveBody: {{count}} invoices will be approved and posted. This action cannot be undone.
invoices.bulkRevertBody: {{count}} invoices will be reverted and their payments removed.

quotations.title: Quotations
quotations.subtitle: Send quotes to customers and convert them to invoices in one click
quotations.confirmBody: The quotation will be confirmed and can no longer be edited. Continue?
quotations.revertBody: The quotation will be moved back to draft status. Continue?
quotations.convertBody: A new sales invoice (draft) will be created from this quotation. Continue?
quotations.deleteBody: Are you sure you want to delete this quotation? This action cannot be undone.
quotations.noItemsHint: Create your first quotation for a customer and confirm it for approval

purchaseOrders.title: Purchase Orders
purchaseOrders.subtitle: Issue purchase orders to suppliers and convert them to purchase invoices automatically
purchaseOrders.confirmBody: The purchase order will be confirmed and can no longer be edited. Continue?
purchaseOrders.revertBody: The purchase order will be moved back to draft status. Continue?
purchaseOrders.convertBody: A new purchase invoice (draft) will be created from this order. Continue?
purchaseOrders.deleteBody: Are you sure you want to delete this purchase order? This action cannot be undone.
purchaseOrders.noItemsHint: Create your first purchase order for a supplier and convert it to an invoice on receipt

reportsPage.title: Financial Reports
reportsPage.subtitle: Reports built from posted journal entries only

tax.noReports: No tax reports available for the company's country.
tax.whtNote: Withholding is computed on the net value excluding VAT, and applies only when the dealing with a single supplier exceeds EGP 300.
tax.payrollNote: Payroll tax is part of the deductions computed on salaries and is remitted monthly to the authority.

revaluation.note: Revalues foreign-currency account balances at the rate on the chosen date to show unrealized gains/losses.

cashForecast.note: Forecast of upcoming cash based on customer and supplier invoice due dates.

superAdmin.title: Super Admin
superAdmin.subtitle: Login to the admin dashboard
superAdmin.landingPageEditorSubtitle: Edit all landing page content and sections

landing.heroBadge: 14 days free trial — no credit card required
landing.heroDescription: A comprehensive Arabic cloud accounting system — easy to use, outstanding financial reports, country-specific taxes, multi-currency reports, and 24/7 support from certified accountants.
landing.aboutText1: Hesabat was established to become one of the most important institutions in the accounting and financial field in the Arab world — relying on its cadres that qualify it to earn the respect of our clients.
landing.aboutText2: At Hesabat, we provide a team of qualified professionals to deliver the highest level of financial and accounting services. Whether you are an entrepreneur or an established company, we provide you with the support and expertise needed to achieve financial success.
landing.whyUsSubtitle: A team of certified accountants built software to solve Arab companies' problems
landing.whyUs1Desc: No accounting experience needed. Simple design and clear steps. Goodbye complex Excel!
landing.whyUs2Desc: Interactive charts, custom reports, export to Excel/PDF, and smart dashboards
landing.whyUs3Desc: Ready tax reports compliant with Egypt, Saudi Arabia, UAE, and all countries we serve
landing.whyUs4Desc: Track your business in any currency. Automatic conversion, comparison reports, and revaluation
landing.whyUs5Desc: New features added every month. The system grows with your company and evolves with market needs
landing.whyUs6Desc: Have a feature idea? Tell us and we'll build it. We work with you, not just sell software
landing.whyUs7Desc: We migrate your data from any software or Excel to Hesabat for free for a limited time. No hassle
landing.whyUs8Desc: Specialized support team of certified accountants. Not just technical support, professional accounting support
landing.chartsSubtitle: See your business from different angles — charts, comparisons, and advanced analysis
landing.chartCurrencyDesc: Track your business in EGP, USD, SAR, AED, KWD, QAR, BHD, OMR
landing.targetAudiencesSubtitle: A flexible system suitable for various types of companies and institutions in the Arab world
landing.target1Desc: An integrated solution at an affordable price that fits your budget and grows with you
landing.target2Desc: Manage multiple clients' accounts in one system with complete data separation
landing.target3Desc: Invoices, inventory, customers, sales reports, and payment gateway integration
landing.target4Desc: Track inventory, invoices, customers, suppliers, and delivery
landing.target5Desc: Cost centers, inventory, fixed assets, production reports
landing.target6Desc: Service invoices, insurance, payroll, and receivables tracking
landing.target7Desc: Fee invoices, payroll, expenses, financial reports
landing.featuresSubtitle: Click any feature to learn more
landing.feature1Desc: Create sales and purchase invoices with different types (services, goods, vehicles) with ready templates and email sending
landing.feature2Desc: Balance sheet, income statement, cash flow, advanced financial analysis and interactive charts
landing.feature3Desc: Calculate VAT, income tax, commercial profits according to your country's laws
landing.feature4Desc: Subsidiary ledger, balances, aging reports, financial transactions and full history
landing.feature5Desc: Team invitations, multiple roles, full permission control for each user
landing.feature6Desc: File uploads, attachments for journal entries, add images to invoices and documents
landing.feature7Desc: Bank accounts, movements, reconciliations, bank reconciliations and revaluation
landing.feature8Desc: Record assets, calculate depreciation, multiple depreciation methods (declining, straight-line, composite)
landing.feature9Desc: Inventory, tracking, cost reports, and inventory management with average cost
landing.feature10Desc: Track costs by centers, performance comparison, advanced analytical reports
landing.feature11Desc: Invoices, payments, debts, performance reports, automatic alerts for amounts due
landing.feature12Desc: Payroll calculation, advances, custody, social insurance and taxes
landing.compareSubtitle: See the difference between Hesabat and traditional methods (Excel / complex software)
landing.migrationSubtitle: We migrate your data from any accounting software or Excel to Hesabat for free. Our team handles everything — no hassle.
landing.migrationSources: Excel, QuickBooks, Sage, Any Software, Any ERP
landing.customDevSubtitle: We don't just sell software — we work with you. Have a feature idea for your company? Tell us and we'll build it.
landing.customDev1: Custom features tailored to your industry
landing.customDev3: Custom reports based on your needs
landing.customDev4: API for integration with your systems
landing.testimonialsSubtitle: From Egypt to Saudi Arabia to the UAE — companies from all sectors use Hesabat
landing.testimonial1: Hesabat changed the way we work completely. Financial reports now come out in minutes instead of days. And the technical support is excellent.
landing.testimonial2: We use Hesabat to manage accounts for more than 15 companies. The system is fast and secure, and company separation is excellent.
landing.testimonial3: Very easy system, no accounting experience needed. Invoices and inventory update automatically.
landing.testimonial4: Tax reports prepared according to Egyptian laws saved us a lot of time and effort.
landing.testimonial5: We can track sales, inventory, and customers from mobile. The system is fast and excellent.
landing.testimonial6: An integrated system for invoices, insurance, and payroll. The 24/7 support helped us a lot in the beginning.
landing.pricingSubtitle: Flexible plans for every business size — start free for 14 days
landing.supportDesc: Our support team is not just technical — we are certified accountants. When you ask an accounting question, you get an answer from an expert. We respond to you any time, day or night.
landing.support1: Technical and accounting support at once
landing.support3: Response in less than an hour
landing.support4: Support via chat, WhatsApp, and email
landing.supportChat1: I have a question about VAT in Egypt
landing.supportChat2: In Egypt, VAT = 14% on most goods. The system calculates it automatically and generates a ready-to-file report. Need help preparing the report?
landing.supportChat3: Yes, that helps a lot, thank you!
landing.ctaSubtitle: 14 days free trial — no credit card — free data migration — 24/7 support

landing.metaDescription: A comprehensive cloud accounting system for SMEs. Invoices, reports, taxes, suppliers, inventory, and 24/7 support. 14 days free trial.

paymentsWorkspace.collectionsSubtitle: Record customer receipts and track their allocations
paymentsWorkspace.paymentsSubtitle: Record vendor payments and track their allocations
paymentsWorkspace.deleteConfirmMsg: Are you sure you want to delete this voucher? All allocations will be reversed and invoice balances will be restored.

financialReports.title: Financial Reports
financialReports.subtitle: Financial statements built on posted journal entries

taxDeclarations.title: Tax Declarations
taxDeclarations.subtitle: Tax declarations based on company country — VAT, WHT, and payroll tax

analysis.title: Budgets & Financial Analysis
analysis.subtitle: Comprehensive financial analysis and key performance indicators

health.title: Financial Health
health.note: Score based on profit margin, debt ratio, return on assets, and equity ratio

guidance.title: Financial Guidance
guidance.goodMargin: Good profit margin reflecting pricing and cost efficiency
guidance.lowMargin: Low profit margin — review cost structure and pricing
guidance.loss: Company is operating at a loss — immediate cost review required
guidance.lowDebt: Healthy debt ratio — company relies mainly on equity
guidance.highDebt: High debt ratio — long-term financial risk
guidance.goodRoa: Good return on assets — efficient use of resources
guidance.improveRoa: Improve asset utilization and grow revenues
guidance.reduceExpenses: High expense ratio — look for cost reduction opportunities
guidance.buildEquity: Build retained earnings to reduce reliance on debt
guidance.strongEquity: Strong equity base supports financial stability
guidance.reviewMonthly: Review financial ratios monthly to catch trends early
guidance.cashBuffer: Maintain a cash buffer covering 3 months of expenses
